summary: Frontend UI testing completed for blue sidebar and smaller font changes. All features working correctly - login page, blue sidebar (#1e40af), mobile blue header with hamburger menu, dashboard with stat cards, navigation between all pages, and logout functionality.
passed_tests: Login page renders correctly with email/password fields and Sign In button
Blue sidebar (#1e40af = rgb(30, 64, 175)) renders on desktop with white text
All navigation links visible in sidebar: Dashboard, Month MIS, Loans, Analytics, Schemes, Users, Statuses, Field Config, Settings
Mobile blue header (#1e40af) with hamburger menu works correctly
Mobile menu opens and shows all navigation links
Dashboard page loads with stat cards showing data (Total Applications, Sanctioned Amount, Disbursed Amount, etc.)
Navigation works between all pages: Dashboard, Month MIS, Loans, Analytics, Schemes, Users, Statuses, Settings
Logout button in sidebar works - redirects to login page
MIS Board page loads with table data showing loan entries
Loans page loads with table showing loan applications
User info and role badge displayed in sidebar
Footer displays correctly with copyright text
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI changes verified - blue sidebar (#1e40af) with white text, mobile blue header, smaller fonts (13px base). All navigation and pages working. Previous iteration_1 covered backend 100%. No new issues found in this UI-only update.

ui_verification_details.text_contrast: White text on blue background - good contrast
